name: ExtensionPaymentReconciliation_Allocation_TargetItem
title: R5: Sub-element of the subject (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PaymentReconciliation.allocation.targetItem[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PaymentReconciliation.allocation.targetItem[x]` 0..1 `Identifier, positiveInt, string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PaymentReconciliation.allocation.targetItem[x]` 0..1 `Identifier, positiveInt, string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PaymentReconciliation.allocation.targetItem[x]` has a context of PaymentReconciliation.detail based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PaymentReconciliation`.
Element `PaymentReconciliation.allocation.targetItem[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

Element `PaymentReconciliation.allocation.targetItem[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Identifies the claim line item, encounter or other sub-element being paid. Note payment may be partial, that is not match the then outstanding balance or amount incurred.
